message:
feat(shopify,square): refactor Shopify auth model and rewrite Square manifest to schema 2.1

Shopify: Replace bare access_token string with a ShopifyAuth enum type
that supports multiple authentication modes and secretless detection.
All client methods updated to use the new auth abstraction for header
injection. Types expanded with ShopifyAuth enum and supporting variants.
Add fcp-manifest dev-dependency for manifest validation tests.

Square: Complete manifest rewrite from ~60 to ~600 lines with full
schema 2.1 compliance including stateless state model, detailed scope
documentation, zone permissions, and first-slice operation definitions
for payments (list, get, create, refund), orders (list, get, create),
catalog (list, get), customers (list, get), and locations (list) with
risk levels, safety tiers, idempotency classes, and AI agent hints.
Fix read-only operation idempotency from None to Strict. Change
create_payment and refund_payment to require Interactive approval.
Add fcp-manifest dev-dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,5 +32,6 @@ hex.workspace = true
 [dev-dependencies]
 chrono.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto.workspace = true
+fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 fcp-testkit.workspace = true
 wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -1,61 +1,603 @@
-[format]
-type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
 schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:112a4998b16f9fa9de056dc80d9f4a141fd8ceba58104c025042c7b7a11ae0b5"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.square"
-name = "Square"
+name = "Square Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "Square API connector for payments, orders, catalog, customers, and locations"
-archetype = "operational"
-homepage = "https://developer.squareup.com/docs"
+description = "Merchant-scoped Square connector for first-slice payments, refunds, orders, catalog, customers, locations, and connectivity verification"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "One injected bearer access token per connector instance. The first slice does not manage OAuth install, token refresh, multi-merchant brokering, or durable connector state."
 
 [zones]
 home = "z:work"
-allowed_sources = ["z:work"]
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
 allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
-tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+forbidden = ["z:public", "z:community"]
 
 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
 optional = []
-forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "network.listen", "system.privileged"]
+
+# Auth and scope model:
+# - Each connector instance is bound to one injected Square bearer token.
+# - The token can be a PAT or an OAuth seller token provisioned out-of-band.
+# - The token is merchant-scoped; location-sensitive operations still require explicit
+#   `location_id` or `location_ids` input.
+# - OAuth installation, token refresh, merchant discovery, and cross-merchant fan-out
+#   are out of scope for this first slice.
+#
+# First-slice non-goals:
+# - Invoices, inventory adjustments, gift cards, payouts, disputes, terminal flows,
+#   webhook ingestion, and any workflow that captures browser or mobile checkout state.
+
+[provides.operations."square.health"]
+description = "Probe the configured Square seller token by calling the Locations API and verifying API reachability."
+capability = "square.locations.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."square.health".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.health".output_schema]
+required = ["status"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.health".output_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.health".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."square.health".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need to confirm that the configured seller token can reach the Square API before invoking other operations."
+common_mistakes = ["Assuming health proves every optional seller permission is granted. It only proves that the configured token can reach the Locations API."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.locations.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list"]
+description = "List locations visible to the configured Square seller token."
+capability = "square.locations.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list".output_schema]
+required = ["locations"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list".output_schema.properties.locations]
+type = "array"
 
-[provides.operations.payments_list]
-summary = "List payments"
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."square.locations.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need valid Square location IDs for downstream payments or order workflows."
+common_mistakes = ["Treating merchant scope and location scope as the same thing. The token identifies the seller, but many workflows still require an explicit location ID."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.health", "square.orders.list", "square.orders.create", "square.payments.list", "square.payments.create"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list"]
+description = "List payments for the configured seller, optionally filtered by one Square location and paginated with Square cursors."
 capability = "square.payments.read"
-risk = "low"
+risk_level = "low"
 safety_tier = "safe"
-idempotency = "none"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".input_schema.properties.cursor]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".input_schema.properties.location_id]
+type = "string"
 
-[provides.operations.payments_list.network_constraints]
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".output_schema]
+required = ["payments"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".output_schema.properties.payments]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".output_schema.properties.cursor]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".network_constraints]
 host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
 port_allow = [443]
-require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
 require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 5242880
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need recent payment records for the configured seller or one specific location."
+common_mistakes = ["Passing page numbers instead of Square cursors.", "Assuming this operation can fan out across multiple merchants. Each connector instance is bound to one seller token."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.payments.get", "square.locations.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get"]
+description = "Retrieve one Square payment by payment ID."
+capability = "square.payments.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".input_schema]
+required = ["payment_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".input_schema.properties.payment_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".output_schema]
+required = ["payment"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".output_schema.properties.payment]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
 deny_localhost = true
 deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
 
-[provides.operations.payments_list.ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When listing payments"
+[provides.operations."square.payments.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need the canonical state of one known payment."
+common_mistakes = ["Passing a display label instead of the Square payment ID."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.payments.list", "square.payments.refund"]
 
-[provides.operations.payments_create]
-summary = "Create a payment"
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create"]
+description = "Create a real Square payment against the configured seller token."
 capability = "square.payments.write"
-risk = "high"
+risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
 idempotency = "strict"
 
-[provides.operations.payments_create.network_constraints]
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema]
+required = ["source_id", "idempotency_key", "amount_money"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.source_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.idempotency_key]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.amount_money]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.location_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.customer_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".input_schema.properties.note]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".output_schema]
+required = ["payment"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".output_schema.properties.payment]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".network_constraints]
 host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
 port_allow = [443]
-require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
 require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need to create a real payment for the configured seller."
+common_mistakes = ["Reusing an idempotency key across logically different charges.", "Forgetting that `amount_money.amount` is in the smallest currency unit.", "Treating this as a sandbox-only bookkeeping call. It has real financial side effects."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.payments.get", "square.payments.refund", "square.locations.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund"]
+description = "Refund a previously created Square payment."
+capability = "square.payments.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".input_schema]
+required = ["idempotency_key", "payment_id", "amount_money"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".input_schema.properties.idempotency_key]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".input_schema.properties.payment_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".input_schema.properties.amount_money]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".input_schema.properties.reason]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".output_schema]
+required = ["refund"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".output_schema.properties.refund]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
 deny_localhost = true
 deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."square.payments.refund".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need to refund a completed payment."
+common_mistakes = ["Requesting a refund larger than the captured payment.", "Retrying without a new or intentionally reused idempotency key.", "Treating refunds as low-risk bookkeeping operations."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.payments.get", "square.payments.create"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.orders.list"]
+description = "Search orders for one or more Square locations using the seller token bound to this connector instance."
+capability = "square.orders.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"

+
+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".input_schema]

+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".input_schema.properties.location_ids]

+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".input_schema.properties.cursor]

+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".output_schema]

+
+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".output_schema.properties.orders]

+[provides.operations."square.orders.list".output_schema.properties.cursor]

+[provides.operations."square.orders.create".output_schema.properties.order]

+
+[provides.operations."square.orders.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need to create an order record for a known Square location."
+common_mistakes = ["Omitting `location_id`.", "Retrying order creation without supplying an idempotency key.", "Expecting this first slice to handle invoice generation, fulfillment, or payment capture."]
+examples = []
+related = ["square.orders.list", "square.locations.list", "square.payments.create"]
+
+[provides.operations."square.catalog.list"]
+description = "List Square catalog objects visible to the configured seller token."
+capability = "square.catalog.read"
+risk_level = "low"

+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."square.catalog.list".output_schema.properties.cursor]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."square.catalog.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["connect.squareup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true

+require_sni = true

+[provides.operations."square.customers.list"]

 [sandbox]
 profile = "strict"
